clusters.title: UK investigating reports Russian warship fired warning shots near yacht in English Channel
clusters.neutral_headline: UK’s Starmer says Russian warship’s warning shots in Channel ‘reckless’
bullet_summary: Reported by BBC World, France24, Al Jazeera and others

items.title: UK investigating reports Russian warship fired warning shots near yacht in English Channel
items.standfirst: The retired couple tell BBC Newsnight they tried to show the warship they had changed course in the English Channel before the shots were fired.
items.content: The retired couple tell BBC Newsnight they tried to show the warship they had changed course in the English Channel before the shots were fired.

items.title: UK investigating warning shots fired by Russian ship at yacht
items.standfirst: Russia appears to have fired warning shots at a UK-registered yacht in the English Channel on June 16. British authorities say they are investigating the incident but so far treating it as isolated. The Grigorovich had been missioned with escorting tankers carrying Russian oil through the channel in the past. There were no reports of injuries or damage to the yacht.
items.content: Russia appears to have fired warning shots at a UK-registered yacht in the English Channel on June 16. British authorities say they are investigating the incident but so far treating it as isolated. The Grigorovich had been missioned with escorting tankers carrying Russian oil through the channel in the past. There were no reports of injuries or damage to the yacht.

items.title: UK’s Starmer says Russian warship’s warning shots in Channel ‘reckless’
items.standfirst: Russia says shots were fired to divert a yacht outside the UK's territorial waters.
items.content: Russia says shots were fired to divert a yacht outside the UK's territorial waters.

items.title: 'Warning fire went up': Couple on board yacht describe encounter with Russian warship
items.standfirst: The Russian frigate fired warning shots near a British retired couple on a yacht in the English Channel.
items.content: The Russian frigate fired warning shots near a British retired couple on a yacht in the English Channel.

items.title: What we know about Russian warship that fired warning shots in English Channel
items.standfirst: A Russia warship fired warning shots at a UK-registered yacht in the English Channel in an incident that has intensified national security concerns.
items.content: A Russia warship fired warning shots at a UK-registered yacht in the English Channel in an incident that has intensified national security concerns.

items.standfirst: The U.K. Defense Ministry was investigating reports that a Russian warship fired warning shots at a British yacht.
items.content: The U.K. Defense Ministry was investigating reports that a Russian warship fired warning shots at a British yacht.

clusters.title: Vietnam police rescue hundreds of cats stolen for meat by crime ring
clusters.neutral_headline: Vietnam police rescue hundreds of cats stolen for meat by crime ring
bullet_summary: Reported by Guardian World, Sky News World, Al Jazeera and others

items.title: Vietnam police rescue hundreds of cats stolen for meat by crime ring
items.standfirst: Major operation launched after spate of pet thefts in Ho Chi Minh City, according to local mediaPolice in Vietnam have rescued more than 400 cats in a bust of a cat meat crime ring in Ho Chi Minh City, according to animal welfare groups and local media reports.More than 40 cats were reunited with their owners after the multiday operation last week, but several dozen of those rescued have died due to the harsh conditions in which they were found, the groups said. Continue reading...

Continue reading...

items.title: Hundreds of cats stolen for meat rescued in Vietnam
items.standfirst: Nine people have been arrested after more than 400 cats destined for slaughter were rescued in Vietnam.
items.content: Nine people have been arrested after more than 400 cats destined for slaughter were rescued in Vietnam.

items.title: Vietnam police rescue more than 400 cats from animal theft crime ring
items.standfirst: Animal welfare groups say the bust highlights the 'enormous scale' of the country's cat meat trade.
items.content: Animal welfare groups say the bust highlights the 'enormous scale' of the country's cat meat trade.

items.title: Hundreds of cats stolen for food in Vietnam rescued by police, welfare group says
items.standfirst: Police have arrested nine people and rescued more than 400 cats destined for slaughter, with more than 40 reunited with their owners.
items.content: Police have arrested nine people and rescued more than 400 cats destined for slaughter, with more than 40 reunited with their owners.

clusters.title: Explosive UFC White House event drone attack may have been foiled after a suspect's mom reported him
clusters.neutral_headline: Group planned to attack White House UFC event using snipers and drones, FBI says
bullet_summary: Reported by CBS News, France24, BBC World

items.title: Explosive UFC White House event drone attack may have been foiled after a suspect's mom reported him
items.standfirst: The FBI says it foiled a plot to attack Sunday's UFC event at the White House. Court records detail an alleged plot to use drones carrying explosives and snipers to target certain event attendees. CBS News' Katrina Kaufman has the latest.
items.content: The FBI says it foiled a plot to attack Sunday's UFC event at the White House. Court records detail an alleged plot to use drones carrying explosives and snipers to target certain event attendees. CBS News' Katrina Kaufman has the latest.

items.title: Alleged White House UFC plot involved explosive drones and snipers
items.standfirst: Five people so far are facing criminal charges related to an alleged plot to attack the UFC event at the White House on Sunday. Investigators say the suspects planned to use snipers and drones with explosives. Ed O'Keefe reports.
items.content: Five people so far are facing criminal charges related to an alleged plot to attack the UFC event at the White House on Sunday. Investigators say the suspects planned to use snipers and drones with explosives. Ed O'Keefe reports.

items.title: Foiled White House attack: Group planned to use snipers and drones, says FBI
items.standfirst: The FBI has said it thwarted a planned attack on the UFC mixed martial arts event on the White House lawn on the weekend, with the attackers allegedly planning to use explosive-laden drones to strike the north side of the White House while snipers would shoot people as they fled. Five people have been charged over the plot and they were allegedly motivated in part by anger at the handling of investigative files related to sex offender Jeffrey Epstein.
items.content: The FBI has said it thwarted a planned attack on the UFC mixed martial arts event on the White House lawn on the weekend, with the attackers allegedly planning to use explosive-laden drones to strike the north side of the White House while snipers would shoot people as they fled. Five people have been charged over the plot and they were allegedly motivated in part by anger at the handling of investigative files related to sex offender Jeffrey Epstein.

items.title: Group planned to attack White House UFC event using snipers and drones, FBI says
items.standfirst: In newly unsealed court filings, the government says the group allegedly expressed grievances about corruption, the Epstein files, and data centres.
items.content: In newly unsealed court filings, the government says the group allegedly expressed grievances about corruption, the Epstein files, and data centres.

clusters.title: Fatal shooting of Russian anti-Putin artist likely politically motivated, Polish PM says
clusters.neutral_headline: Russian artist and Putin critic shot dead in Poland
bullet_summary: Polish Prime Minister Donald Tusk said Wednesday that the fatal shooting of exiled Russian artist Semyon Skrepetsky was likely a political assassination
Reported by France24, BBC World, Sky News World

items.title: Fatal shooting of Russian anti-Putin artist likely politically motivated, Polish PM says
items.standfirst: Polish Prime Minister Donald Tusk said Wednesday that the fatal shooting of exiled Russian artist Semyon Skrepetsky was likely a political assassination. The Kremlin critic, known for provocative caricatures of President Vladimir Putin and other political figures, was shot dead by an unidentified gunman in eastern Poland on Monday.
items.content: Polish Prime Minister Donald Tusk said Wednesday that the fatal shooting of exiled Russian artist Semyon Skrepetsky was likely a political assassination. The Kremlin critic, known for provocative caricatures of President Vladimir Putin and other political figures, was shot dead by an unidentified gunman in eastern Poland on Monday.

items.title: Russian artist and Putin critic shot dead in Poland
items.standfirst: Robert Kuzovkov, who used the pseudonym Semyon Skrepetsky, has been known for his caricatures of politicians including Vladimir Putin.
items.content: Robert Kuzovkov, who used the pseudonym Semyon Skrepetsky, has been known for his caricatures of politicians including Vladimir Putin.

items.title: Russian artist who criticised Putin is shot dead
items.standfirst: An artist critical of Russia's President Vladimir Putin was shot and killed near his home in eastern Poland on Monday.
items.content: An artist critical of Russia's President Vladimir Putin was shot and killed near his home in eastern Poland on Monday.

clusters.title: Messi becomes joint World Cup all-time scorer with hat trick against Algeria
clusters.neutral_headline: Messi becomes joint World Cup all-time scorer with hat trick against Algeria

items.title: Messi becomes joint World Cup all-time scorer with hat trick against Algeria
items.standfirst: Argentina beat Algeria 3-0 on June 16. Lionel Messi's hat trick of goals came 20 years to the day after his World Cup debut. Messi is now the first man to play in six World Cups and the tournament's joint all-time scorer, alongside Germany's Miroslav Klose, with 16 goals. The player was praised by supporters on both sides.
items.content: Argentina beat Algeria 3-0 on June 16. Lionel Messi's hat trick of goals came 20 years to the day after his World Cup debut. Messi is now the first man to play in six World Cups and the tournament's joint all-time scorer, alongside Germany's Miroslav Klose, with 16 goals. The player was praised by supporters on both sides.

items.title: Messi ties record for men's World Cup goals as he leads Argentina over Algeria
items.standfirst: Lionel Messi on Tuesday became the first man to play in six World Cups. He scored three goals to help lead Argentina over Algeria in their opening match and now has 16 World Cup goals, which is tied for the most of all time.
items.content: Lionel Messi on Tuesday became the first man to play in six World Cups. He scored three goals to help lead Argentina over Algeria in their opening match and now has 16 World Cup goals, which is tied for the most of all time.

items.title: Messi ties men's World Cup goals record with first World Cup hat trick
items.standfirst: Lionel Messi tied the Men's World Cup goals record with his first World Cup hat trick as Argentina topped Algeria.
items.content: Lionel Messi tied the Men's World Cup goals record with his first World Cup hat trick as Argentina topped Algeria.

clusters.title: Israeli air strikes on Lebanon continue despite US-Iran deal
clusters.neutral_headline: Israeli air strikes on Lebanon continue despite US-Iran deal
bullet_summary: There has been a reduction in violence since the US-Iran agreement was announced, but attacks have not stopped
Lebanon has been targeted by fresh Israeli strikes despite the peace deal agreement announced by the US and Israel

items.title: Israeli air strikes on Lebanon continue despite US-Iran deal
items.standfirst: There has been a reduction in violence since the US-Iran agreement was announced, but attacks have not stopped.
items.content: There has been a reduction in violence since the US-Iran agreement was announced, but attacks have not stopped.

items.title: Thousands flock back to south Lebanon despite Israeli strikes amid US-Iran deal
items.standfirst: Lebanon has been targeted by fresh Israeli strikes despite the peace deal agreement announced by the US and Israel. Despite the attacks and warnings from their government, many south Lebanese are desperate to go back home, with thousands of people driving back. But civilians still remain sceptic. FRANCE 24's Renée Davis tells us more from Beirut.
items.content: Lebanon has been targeted by fresh Israeli strikes despite the peace deal agreement announced by the US and Israel. Despite the attacks and warnings from their government, many south Lebanese are desperate to go back home, with thousands of people driving back. But civilians still remain sceptic. FRANCE 24's Renée Davis tells us more from Beirut.

clusters.title: Trump puts Jay Clayton's nomination for intel chief on hold
clusters.neutral_headline: Trump puts Jay Clayton's nomination for intel chief on hold
bullet_summary: Reported by CBS News, NPR News

items.title: Trump puts Jay Clayton's nomination for intel chief on hold
items.standfirst: President Trump delayed Jay Clayton's nomination to lead the U.S. intelligence community, saying he's trying to force Congress to pass a voter ID bill that currently lacks enough support to be approved.
items.content: President Trump delayed Jay Clayton's nomination to lead the U.S. intelligence community, saying he's trying to force Congress to pass a voter ID bill that currently lacks enough support to be approved.

items.title: President Trump calls to delay nomination of intel pick Jay Clayton
items.standfirst: The Senate was set to begin the confirmation process for Jay Clayton as Director of National Intelligence Today. But President Trump is calling for a delay.
items.content: The Senate was set to begin the confirmation process for Jay Clayton as Director of National Intelligence Today. But President Trump is calling for a delay.(Image credit: Chip Somodevilla)

clusters.title: 1 person killed, 5 rescued after small plane crashes on busy Texas highway
clusters.neutral_headline: Dramatic rescue after plane crashes onto Texas highway
bullet_summary: Reported by CBS News, Al Jazeera

items.title: 1 person killed, 5 rescued after small plane crashes on busy Texas highway
items.standfirst: A small plane crashed on a busy highway in Texas on Tuesday and caught on fire. People jumped into action to help those on board escape. One person was killed, police say. Lilia Luciano reports.
items.content: A small plane crashed on a busy highway in Texas on Tuesday and caught on fire. People jumped into action to help those on board escape. One person was killed, police say. Lilia Luciano reports.

items.title: Dramatic rescue efforts after fiery small plane crash in Texas kills 1
items.standfirst: A business jet with six on board crashed on a Laredo, Texas, highway and caught fire, killing one person and causing chaos as passersby frantically tried to save those inside.
items.content: A business jet with six on board crashed on a Laredo, Texas, highway and caught fire, killing one person and causing chaos as passersby frantically tried to save those inside.

clusters.title: Brazil Supreme Court sentences Bolsonaro's son over US lobbying
clusters.neutral_headline: Brazil Supreme Court sentences Bolsonaro's son over US lobbying
bullet_summary: The third son of former far-right President Jair Bolsonaro was found guilty of pressuring US officials to impose economic sanctions on his own country

items.title: Brazil Supreme Court sentences Bolsonaro's son over US lobbying
items.standfirst: In Brazil, Eduardo Bolsonaro has been sentenced to four years in prison. The third son of former far-right President Jair Bolsonaro was found guilty of pressuring US officials to impose economic sanctions on his own country. It was a bid to influence his father’s Supreme Court trial — with the elder Bolsonaro currently serving a 27-year sentence for a failed coup attempt in 2022.
items.content: In Brazil, Eduardo Bolsonaro has been sentenced to four years in prison. The third son of former far-right President Jair Bolsonaro was found guilty of pressuring US officials to impose economic sanctions on his own country. It was a bid to influence his father’s Supreme Court trial — with the elder Bolsonaro currently serving a 27-year sentence for a failed coup attempt in 2022.

items.title: Jair Bolsonaro’s son sentenced to four years in jail for seeking US interference in father’s Brazil coup trial
items.standfirst: Brazil supreme court finds that Eduardo Bolsonaro – who resides in the US - tried to get sanctions put on judges trying ex-president over coup plotBrazil’s supreme court has sentenced Eduardo Bolsonaro to four years and two months in prison after finding him guilty of courting US ⁠interference in his father’s coup plot trial last year.The office of Brazil’s ‌prosecutor general had ‌charged Eduardo Bolsonaro – who lives in the US - courting interference from the Trump administration to help Jair Bolsonaro’s case, by imposing sanctions on the court’s justices and tariffs on Brazilian goods. Continue reading...
items.content: Brazil supreme court finds that Eduardo Bolsonaro – who resides in the US - tried to get sanctions put on judges trying ex-president over coup plotBrazil’s supreme court has sentenced Eduardo Bolsonaro to four years and two months in prison after finding him guilty of courting US ⁠interference in his father’s coup plot trial last year.The office of Brazil’s ‌prosecutor general had ‌charged Eduardo Bolsonaro – who lives in the US - courting interference from the Trump administration to help Jair Bolsonaro’s case, by imposing sanctions on the court’s justices and tariffs on Brazilian goods. Continue reading...

items.content: Thursday's contest could pave the way for Manchester Mayor Andy Burnham to challenge Keir Starmer's premiership.

items.title: PM warns Burnham against immediate leadership challenge if he wins by-election

items.content: Keir Starmer says Labour should focus on a subsequent Manchester mayoral race if Andy Burnham wins in Makerfield.

clusters.title: Paramount rejected ad criticizing its owners and Warner Bros acquisition
clusters.neutral_headline: Paramount rejected ad criticizing its owners and Warner Bros acquisition
bullet_summary: The commercial was submitted by the Freedom of the Press Foundation to run during Donald Trump’s UFC event

items.title: Paramount rejected ad criticizing its owners and Warner Bros acquisition
items.standfirst: Rejected citing ‘conflict of interest’, the ad took aim at Trump allies David Ellison, Paramount Skydance chief, and his billionaire father, Larry EllisonParamount Skydance refused to air an ad submitted by a press freedom group that heavily criticized the network’s leadership and merger with Warner Bros Discovery, with an advertising associate deeming it a “conflict of interest”.The Freedom of the Press Foundation had hoped to air the 30-second ad during Sunday’s Ultimate Fighting Championship broadcast at the White House, which aired on the streaming service Paramount+ – though a client partner for Paramount told the organization’s ad-buyer that such placement was not guaranteed. Continue reading...
items.content: Rejected citing ‘conflict of interest’, the ad took aim at Trump allies David Ellison, Paramount Skydance chief, and his billionaire father, Larry EllisonParamount Skydance refused to air an ad submitted by a press freedom group that heavily criticized the network’s leadership and merger with Warner Bros Discovery, with an advertising associate deeming it a “conflict of interest”.The Freedom of the Press Foundation had hoped to air the 30-second ad during Sunday’s Ultimate Fighting Championship broadcast at the White House, which aired on the streaming service Paramount+ – though a client partner for Paramount told the organization’s ad-buyer that such placement was not guaranteed. Continue reading...

items.title: Paramount Refused to Air an Ad Criticizing Its Merger With Warner Bros.
items.standfirst: The commercial was submitted by the Freedom of the Press Foundation to run during Donald Trump’s UFC event. It criticized the $111 billion merger as a threat to the First Amendment.
items.content: The commercial was submitted by the Freedom of the Press Foundation to run during Donald Trump’s UFC event. It criticized the $111 billion merger as a threat to the First Amendment.
